docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,628.06 FILED BY RASHKOVSKAYA, YULIYA KLARFIELD, DYLAN AS TO DEFENDANT VRBO. COM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASHKOVSKAYA, YULIYA KLARFIELD, DYLAN AS TO DEFENDANT VRBO. COM, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-07-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VRBO. COM, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF YULIYA RASHKOVSKAYA AND DYLAN KLARFIELD ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VRBO.COM IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/23/2025. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
